# viettelidc_vdbs_database_instance (Data Source)

Look up an existing ViettelIDC VDBS database instance by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Tra cá»©u Database Instance Ä‘ang cháº¡y
data "viettelidc_vdbs_database_instance" "main" {
  id = "2851"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Database instance ID.

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID the database instance belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `db_subnet_group_name` (String) Name of the subnet group attached to the instance.
- `flavor_id` (String) Flavor (instance type) ID.
- `name` (String) Instance name.
- `parameter_group_name` (String) Name of the parameter group attached to the instance.
- `status` (String) Current status (e.g. ACTIVE, ERROR).
- `volume_size` (Number) Storage volume size in GB.
